nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Go-specific coding style rules covering mandatory gofmt/goimports formatting, interface-and-struct design principles, and error wrapping conventions; extends the common coding-style baseline.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Go-specific PostToolUse hook recommendations for auto-formatting with gofmt/goimports, static analysis with go vet, and extended checks with staticcheck after editing Go files; extends the common hooks baseline.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Go-specific design patterns covering functional options, small interface definitions at the consumer site, and constructor-based dependency injection; extends the common patterns baseline with idiomatic Go examples.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Go-specific security rules covering secret management via environment variables, gosec static security scanning, and mandatory context.Context timeout usage; extends the common security baseline.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Go-specific testing rules prescribing table-driven tests with the standard go test framework, mandatory -race flag for race detection, and coverage measurement; extends the common testing baseline.
